title: ceanothus velutinus var. arboreus
intro: Ceanothus velutinus var. arboreus, also known as Rocky Mountain white cedar, is a variety of the Ceanothus velutinus plant, a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of western North America. The medicinal properties of Ceanothus velutinus var. arboreus include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support immune function, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Ceanothus velutinus var. arboreus is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to promote overall health and well-being.
